tasks.title: Baseline Provider Infrastructure
acceptance_criteria: app.json persists llm_provider and llm_model
runtime uses llm_model instead of hardcoded defaults
onboarding can fetch or fallback to provider model options and save the selection
model discovery failures fall back to curated defaults without aborting onboarding
notes: Added llm_model to config and runtime wiring
Onboarding now selects an LLM model using provider catalog support with fallback defaults
Validated with go test ./internal/config ./cmd/aurelia ./pkg/llm and go test ./...

tasks.title: Anthropic API Key
acceptance_criteria: onboarding supports anthropic
onboarding stores anthropic_api_key
model selection lists Anthropic models or curated fallback
runtime can build Anthropic provider with selected model
docs describe setup and limitations
notes: Added Anthropic SDK-based provider with tool-use mapping
Onboarding now supports anthropic provider selection and anthropic model catalogs
Validated with go test ./internal/config ./cmd/aurelia ./pkg/llm and go test ./...

tasks.title: Google API Key
acceptance_criteria: onboarding supports google
onboarding stores google_api_key
model selection lists Gemini models or curated fallback
runtime builds Gemini with selected model
docs describe setup and limitations
notes: Promoted Google Gemini to a first-class provider in runtime wiring
Added Google model discovery with filtering for generateContent-capable models
Validated with go test ./internal/config ./cmd/aurelia ./pkg/llm and go test ./...

tasks.title: OpenRouter
acceptance_criteria: onboarding supports openrouter
onboarding stores openrouter_api_key
model selection lists remote models plus openrouter/auto and openrouter/free
runtime builds OpenRouter provider with correct endpoint and headers
docs explain fixed model vs auto routing vs free routing
notes: Added OpenRouter runtime support on top of the OpenAI-compatible base
Added official OpenRouter model discovery plus openrouter/auto and openrouter/free router options
Validated with go test ./internal/config ./cmd/aurelia ./pkg/llm and go test ./...

tasks.title: OpenAI-Compatible Base
acceptance_criteria: shared request/response implementation handles model, base URL, API key, and optional headers
wrappers can configure OpenRouter, Z.ai, and Alibaba without duplicating transport logic
tool calling remains compatible with the existing loop
notes: Added a reusable OpenAI-compatible provider for chat-completions APIs
Covered request building, custom headers, auth, and response parsing with tests
Validated with go test ./pkg/llm ./cmd/aurelia ./internal/config and go test ./...

tasks.title: Z.ai
acceptance_criteria: onboarding supports zai
onboarding stores zai_api_key
runtime builds Z.ai provider
model selection uses remote catalog when available or curated fallback
docs describe endpoint behavior and limitations
notes: Added Z.ai runtime support on top of the OpenAI-compatible base
Used a curated model catalog based on currently documented chat models
Validated with go test ./internal/config ./cmd/aurelia ./pkg/llm and go test ./...

tasks.title: Alibaba
acceptance_criteria: onboarding supports alibaba
onboarding stores alibaba_api_key
runtime builds Alibaba provider with DashScope compatible endpoint
model selection uses remote catalog when available or curated fallback
docs describe compatibility-mode behavior
notes: Added Alibaba DashScope runtime support on top of the OpenAI-compatible base
Used a curated Qwen model catalog for the compatible-mode integration
Validated with go test ./internal/config ./cmd/aurelia ./pkg/llm and go test ./...

tasks.title: OpenAI API Key
acceptance_criteria: onboarding supports openai
onboarding stores openai_api_key
runtime builds OpenAI provider
model selection lists official models or curated fallback
docs describe setup and limitations
notes: Added OpenAI runtime support on top of the OpenAI-compatible base
Added official model discovery with a filtered chat-capable model list and curated fallback
Validated with go test ./internal/config ./cmd/aurelia ./pkg/llm and go test ./...

tasks.title: Google OAuth
acceptance_criteria: onboarding supports Google auth mode selection
OAuth tokens are persisted and refreshed correctly
runtime can build Google provider from OAuth credentials
docs clearly explain auth flow and local persistence
notes: Added google_auth_mode with api_key and oauth paths kept in parallel
Added `aurelia auth google` with browser callback flow and manual fallback, persisting tokens to ~/.aurelia/config/google_oauth_token.json
Validated with go test ./internal/config ./internal/googleauth ./cmd/aurelia ./pkg/llm and go test ./...
Later removed from the active product surface to keep Google on API key only

tasks.title: OpenAI Codex via MCP
acceptance_criteria: onboarding marks the flow as experimental and local-runtime dependent
config persists Codex CLI mode separately from API-key OpenAI mode
runtime fails clearly when codex is missing or unauthenticated
docs clearly state the local installation prerequisite and experimental status
notes: Added openai_auth_mode with api_key and codex kept in parallel
Added `aurelia auth openai`, which delegates login to the local `codex login` flow and keeps config explicit
Added an experimental Codex MCP-backed provider plus curated OpenAI Codex model fallback while preserving remote model discovery for API-key mode
Validated with go test ./internal/config ./pkg/llm ./cmd/aurelia and go test ./...

tasks.title: Documentation Finalization
docs: provider-specific official docs used in completed tasks
acceptance_criteria: canonical docs reflect supported providers, auth modes, and onboarding behavior
docs do not mention unsupported providers as available
recurring operational traps are captured in docs/LEARNINGS.md when relevant
notes: Updated README and ARCHITECTURE to document OpenAI auth modes, `aurelia auth openai`, and the experimental Codex CLI prerequisite
Roadmap and machine state now reflect the completed provider expansion tasks
Validated with go test ./...

tasks.title: Kilo Gateway
acceptance_criteria: onboarding supports kilo
onboarding stores kilo_api_key
model selection lists models from the official Kilo /models endpoint or curated fallback
runtime builds Kilo provider with the gateway chat completions endpoint
docs describe the API-key setup and provider behavior
notes: Added Kilo Gateway runtime support on top of the OpenAI-compatible base
Added automatic Kilo model discovery from the official /models endpoint with curated fallback models
Updated onboarding, config, and docs to treat Kilo as a first-class provider
Validated with go test ./internal/config ./cmd/aurelia ./pkg/llm and go test ./...
